You paid for the view.
Don't let grime take it.

Professional window cleaning for homes across the Shuswap. Hard water, cottonwood, lake spray, wildfire smoke and ash — we handle it all. See your view again.

Shuswap Lakefront Homeowners

Your neighbors notice dirty windows.
Your guests notice clean ones.

Hard water deposits from lake spray left untreated will permanently etch your glass. Once etched, no cleaner fixes it — only glass replacement. The longer you wait, the harder and more expensive the fix.

Book Before It's Permanent →

Why Wagon Windows

Built on Reliability

We show up on time, do the job right, and leave your windows looking better than you've seen them.

100%

Streak-Free Results

We don't leave until every pane is spotless. If you're not happy, we come back.

Local

Shuswap Owned

We live and work here. We know the Shuswap climate and what your windows deal with every season.

Fast

Easy Booking

Get an instant estimate online in under 2 minutes, or reach us by phone or text. We respond fast.

Safe

Insured & Professional

Fully insured. We treat your home with care — no shortcuts, no damage, no stress.

Google Reviews

What Our Customers Say

Your windows are the first thing guests notice when they pull up. Here's what Shuswap homeowners think after we've been out.

★★★★★

"I didn't realize how clean our windows could look until Wagon Windows showed up. Our home feels so much brighter — thanks for doing such an amazing job!!"

Laura B.
★★★★★

"Prompt, professional and my windows, tracks and screens look brand new. I highly recommend this company and will be using their services again."

Michelle C.
★★★★★

"David and Mike did a fantastic job. 100% recommend."

Val G.

Transparent Pricing

Simple, Honest Rates

No surprises, no hidden fees. Most window cleaners won't show you a number — we will.

Small Home
Up to 15 windows
from $169
Exterior clean
Interior + exterior from $219
Book Now
Most Popular
Medium Home
16–25 windows
from $229
Exterior clean
Interior + exterior from $289
Book Now
Large Home
26–35 windows
from $299
Exterior clean
Interior + exterior from $369
Book Now
⚠ We price by the pane, not the window. Each individual piece of glass = 1 pane. A typical double-hung window has 2 panes — so a home with 15 windows likely has 30+ panes. Not sure? Our quote tool walks you through it, or we can count on arrival.
Commercial storefronts from $169/visit — recurring contracts available
Screens $4 each · Tracks $4/track · Hard water stain removal quoted separately
Minimum job fee $169 · Large or custom homes quoted on-site
Where We Work

Serving the Shuswap Region

Wagon Windows is based in Salmon Arm and proudly serves the surrounding Shuswap communities.

Salmon Arm Sorrento Tappen Blind Bay Sicamous Chase Enderby Armstrong Eagle Bay Celista Scotch Creek Grindrod Spallumcheen Swansea Point Anglemont

Not sure if we cover your area? Send us a message — we're happy to travel for the right job.
